name: agent-harness
description: Multi-agent workflow harness with 3-layer quality gates (mechanical + structural + LLM review). Thin orchestrator enforces Plan → Generate → Verify → Evaluate phases with model-tiered sub-agents. Includes safe refactoring, staged migration, hypothesis-driven debugging, automated test generation, team knowledge base (/team-memory), deep code review (/deep-review), codebase auditing, and markdown optimization for Claude Code. Each multi-agent skill runs an opt-in native Workflow path (single/quick stays inline). For teams that want reviewable AI automation without custom infrastructure.
